jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Licious
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Licious in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
